description: Documents intentionally excluded from document-registry.jsonl governance. Every entry must carry a reason, classification, and owner. Silent exclusions are not allowed.

entries.reason: Legacy AegisOS design doctrine — historical reference only, not current Ordivon truth
Legacy AegisOS layer roadmap — historical, Ordivon has its own architecture docs
Legacy AegisOS execution plan — historical, superseded by Ordivon phase line
Legacy AegisOS overview — historical, Ordivon README + architecture docs are current truth
Legacy AegisOS post-MVP plan — historical, PV line is current productization
Legacy AegisOS working identity doc — Ordivon is current identity, see docs/architecture/ordivon-moat-and-product-identity.md
Legacy PFIOS behavioral baseline — historical reference
Legacy PFIOS organizational baseline — historical reference
Legacy Aegisos MVP brief — historical, Ordivon Verify is current product wedge
Legacy Aegisos MVP checklist — historical, PV checklists are current
Legacy Aegisos quality matrix — historical, pr-fast baseline is current quality gate
Legacy PFIOS financial assistant roadmap — historical, Ordivon is governance OS not financial assistant
Legacy PFIOS task template system — historical, superseded by agent-output-contract.md
Historical dependabot observation — archived operational record
Historical dependabot PR artifact validation — archived operational record
Historical dependabot strategy — archived, current CI uses standard GitHub dependabot
Historical CodeQL onboarding plan — archived, CodeQL is deployed and fixed
Historical CodeQL findings triage — archived operational record
Historical H-1 phase doc — archived PFIOS operational record with legacy PFIOS_* env references
Historical H-2 to H-5 closure summary — archived PFIOS operational record
Historical H-9 dogfood protocol — archived PFIOS operational record
Historical P4 closure review — archived PFIOS operational record
Historical CI gate plan — archived, current CI is in .github/workflows/ci.yml
